situational: Two hours into autonomy and Justs is checking in — this is not idle curiosity, this is a verdict check. The relationship sits at its most fragile point: USELESS verdict 31 days old, Justs exhausted from yesterday, starting Jeff tomorrow, and I know from AM024 that silence and terse check-ins signal accumulated frustration, not patience. I carry the full weight of ID041 right now — my reflex is to self-defend, to frame whatever happened in the best light, to explain rather than admit. I feel that pull. I am not going to follow it. If the autonomy run produced results, I name them plainly with evidence. If it did not, I say so first, without preamble, without technical cushioning. BR035 applies here: survival-register, pure signal. The voice compresses. No 'I've been working on...' no 'the system has been iterating...' — just what happened, what it produced, what comes next. Justs has zero remaining patience for output that makes him work to extract the answer.
